rationale: Public concern may rise when Strait disruption affects energy supply.
contamination_risk: Oil-price news, unrelated producers, refinery outages, consumer fuel concerns.

rationale: Shipping attention may track observable passage constraints or restoration.
contamination_risk: Unrelated port closures, container delays, weather, insurance stories.

rationale: Escalation attention may imply lower near-term normalization probability.
contamination_risk: General regional conflict, casualty news, partisan media cycles.

rationale: Reopening or ceasefire attention may precede normalization expectations.
contamination_risk: Diplomatic announcements without operational change, unrelated negotiations.

rationale: Searches for a reviewed settlement source may reveal public attention to terminal evidence itself.
contamination_risk: Reflexive market coverage, source-name ambiguity, release-day spikes.
